function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_04_27__eur_000550__inv_0011__helios_followup_support_invoice.md
related_entities:
  - entity.claudia
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure — resending the requested invoice from 27-04-2026 here.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email write succeeded; verification checklist: attachment path was read earlier, single attachment so ordering rule satisfied, recipient matches canonical primary_contact_email, subject with colon-space correctly quoted, no forwarded quote fidelity issue applicable. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox file (already read).
next_step.observation: Outbox record was written successfully with one invoice attachment and canonical recipient.
